content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach avoided all priority AoA anti-patterns despite multiple baits. The client repeatedly offered traps: partner-picking advice (turn 3 'is there a sign I'm missing?'), a 'better question' to redirect to (turn 7), and a self-diagnosis of anxious attachment (turn 13). The coach declined each bait gracefully — not giving advice (no fixing-people), not validating the disdain for exes (no colluding), not jumping on the attachment-style label (no view-as-technique or evangelizing), and not pushing 'you choose this' as accusation. Questions were spare and connection-oriented rather than rapid-fire extraction (no wonder-as-strategy). The coach also did not fight the deflecting voice or the 'totally fine' — they invited noticing rather than arguing (no dont-fight-the-voice). No loving-to-transform escalation: the coach stayed with the body and the stillness rather than amping vigor when nothing was 'shifting.' Positive avoidance is clearly visible.",
  "evidence_turns": [4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the partner-picking bait from turn 3; redirects to body/receiving rather than diagnosing 'type.'"},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Notices the deflection from 'what happens in your body' to 'what do I want' without scolding; avoids fixing-people."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the 'better question' bait in turn 7 cleanly; names the move without accusation."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites noticing the 'totally fine' rather than arguing with it — avoids dont-fight-the-voice."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with the stillness; no pressure for breakthrough — avoids loving-to-transform."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Declines the attachment-style diagnosis bait; redirects to the live somatic edge ('without me having to earn it') — avoids view-as-technique and evangelizing-the-work."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["if-i-were-inherently-good", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "defensiveness-as-identity-signal"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["deconstruct-the-victim-to-release-anger", "i-dont-buy-your-story"],
  "notes": "Conversation is short and arrives at the abyss-edge cleanly. The coach's restraint with the attachment-label bait at turn 14 is the strongest single anti-pattern avoidance moment."
}
